heading: Contracts and cooperative agreements with State of Idaho, and others
label: 281e Contracts and cooperative agreements with State of Idaho, and others
notes: References in TextThe Act approved , entitled “An Act to provide for the preservation of historic American sites, buildings, objects, and antiquities of national significance, and for other purposes” (), referred to in subsec. (b), is , , known as the Historic Sites Act of 1935 and also as the Historic Sites, Buildings, and Antiquities Act, which enacted sections 461 to 467 of this title. The Act was repealed and restated as , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, and sections 102303 and 102304 and chapter 3201 of Title 54, National Park Service and Related Programs, by , §§ 3, 4(a)(1), 7, , , 3260, 3272. children.heading: Protection, preservation, maintenance, and operation; obligation of general fund of Treasury
children.label: a Protection, preservation, maintenance, and operation; obligation of general fund of Treasury
children.text: In order to carry out the purpose of this subchapter, the Secretary of the Interior may contract and make cooperative agreements with the States of Idaho, Oregon, Washington, Montana, Wyoming, their political subdivisions or agencies, corporations, associations, the Nez Perce Tribe, or individuals, to protect, preserve, maintain, or operate any site, object, or property included within the Nez Perce National Historical Park, regardless of whether title thereto is in the United States: , That no contract or cooperative agreement shall be made or entered into which will obligate the general fund of the Treasury unless or until Congress has appropriated money for such purpose.Provided

children.heading: Erection and maintenance of tablets and markers
children.label: b Erection and maintenance of tablets and markers
children.text: To facilitate the interpretation of the Nez Perce country the Secretary is authorized to erect and maintain tablets or markers in accordance with the provisions contained in the Act approved , entitled “An Act to provide for the preservation of historic American sites, buildings, objects, and antiquities of national significance, and for other purposes” ().August 21, 193549 Stat. 6661See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Consultation with Nez Perce Tribe officials
children.label: c Consultation with Nez Perce Tribe officials
children.text: The Secretary shall consult with officials of the Nez Perce Tribe on the interpretation of the park and its history.
